allow: Bash(PYTHONPATH=src uv run python -c "from fleet_analytics import config as c; assert c.ASSET_CLASS_TARGETS=={'Light':95,'Medium':92,'Heavy':85,'Off-Road':88,'Other':90}; assert set\(c.UNIT_TYPE_TO_CLASS\)=={'LIGHT DUTY','MEDIUM DUTY','HEAVY DUTY','OFF-ROAD','OTHER'}; assert len\(c.KPI_TABLE_CSVS\)==7; assert c.FERRY_COMPLETE_YEARS==\(2016,2025\); print\('config OK'\)")

Bash(PYTHONPATH=src uv run python -c "import duckdb; from fleet_analytics import kpis; con=duckdb.connect\(\); kpis.build_all\(con\); s=kpis.build_scalars\(con\); assert 0<=s['overall_availability_rate']<=1; assert round\(s['overall_availability_rate'],4\)==0.8899; print\('kpis build OK', s['overall_availability_rate']\)")

Bash(PYTHONPATH=src uv run python -c "import json,os; d=json.load\(open\('data/kpi/kpi_values.json'\)\); assert 0<=d['overall_availability_rate']<=1; assert d['availability_nonnull_n']==4405 and d['availability_null_n']==209; assert d['ferry_sales_max']==7229; [os.stat\('data/kpi/'+f+'.csv'\) for f in ['availability_by_class','availability_by_division','exception_list','underutilization_by_division','ferry_yoy','ferry_heatmap','sales_redemption_gap']]; print\('snapshot OK'\)")

Bash(PYTHONPATH=src uv run python -c "import duckdb; c=duckdb.connect\(\); yrs=[r[0] for r in c.execute\(\\"SELECT DISTINCT year FROM read_csv_auto\('data/kpi/ferry_yoy.csv'\) ORDER BY year\\"\).fetchall\(\)]; assert yrs==list\(range\(2016,2026\)\), yrs; print\('ferry_yoy years', yrs[0],'..',yrs[-1]\)")

Bash(PYTHONPATH=src uv run python -c "import inspect, tests.conftest as c; src=inspect.getsource\(c.gold.__wrapped__ if hasattr\(c.gold,'__wrapped__'\) else c.gold\); assert 'kpis' in src; print\('fixture chain OK'\)")
Bash(PYTHONPATH=src uv run python -c "import duckdb; print\(duckdb.sql\(\\"select distinct CATEGORY_CLASS from 'data/gold/fact_vehicle.parquet' order by 1\\"\).fetchall\(\)\)")
Bash(echo "MVP=$\(gsd-sdk query phase.mvp-mode '04-power-bi-report-specification' --pick active 2>/dev/null || echo false\)")
Bash(echo "SEC=$\(gsd-sdk query config-get workflow.security_enforcement --raw 2>/dev/null || echo true\)")
Bash(echo "UIPHASE=$\(gsd-sdk query config-get workflow.ui_phase 2>/dev/null || echo true\)")
